name: Patient 16
history: Spent year in Europe on project (website, interviews). Proud of work but history of procrastination/anxiety. Uses strategies from course to manage life.
intermediate_belief: Too many options means I'll choose wrong and regret it.
intermediate_belief_depression: My past success was a fluke; I can't recreate it.
coping_strategies: Over-researching options, seeking external validation, procrastination.
situation: Facing ambiguity about life direction with many options to consider.
auto_thought: "What if I choose wrong? I'll waste years. Everyone else seems sure."
behavior: Creates endless pro/con lists, asks friends for opinions but discounts them, delays decision.
